title: Gamification Badges for Metrics Activities
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to earn achievement badges for completing metrics-related activities such as finishing the Metrics Analyst workflow, linking dashboards to metrics, and tagging metrics with categories, so that I feel recognized and motivated to engage deeply with the platform.
description:
Introduces three gamification badges that reward users for key metrics activities:

**Metrics Analyst** — Awarded when a user completes the Metrics Analyst workflow to the end.

**Metrics Weaver** — Awarded when a user establishes at least 3 liked metrics and associates at least 3 dashboards to a metric.

**Tag Master** — Awarded when a user adds at least 2 Lines of Business AND 2 Topics and assigns a tag to at least 3 metrics or reports.

Badges are displayed in a locked/greyed-out state until the user meets the criteria, at which point they become fully visible and awarded. Custom badge artwork was provided for each badge (MetricsAnalyst.png, metricsweaver.png, tagmaster.png).
acceptance_criteria: Three badges are displayed in the user's profile or achievements area: Metrics Analyst, Metrics Weaver, Tag Master
Unearned badges appear in a locked/greyed-out state
Metrics Analyst badge is awarded when the user completes the Metrics Analyst workflow
Metrics Weaver badge is awarded when the user has at least 3 liked metrics and 3 associated dashboards
Tag Master badge is awarded when the user has added at least 2 Lines of Business, 2 Topics, and assigned tags to at least 3 metrics or reports
Badge award status is persisted and displayed correctly across sessions
ux_changes: Displays three badge icons (Metrics Analyst, Metrics Weaver, Tag Master) in the user's profile area. Unearned badges appear greyed-out; earned badges display in full color with award status.
middleware_changes: Implements badge award logic that evaluates user activity against the criteria for each badge. Checks are triggered when relevant actions occur (completing a workflow, liking metrics, associating dashboards, adding tags).
data_model_changes: Stores badge award status per user, including which badges have been earned and when they were awarded.
implementation_notes: Three custom badge images were provided as assets. The award functionality was implemented to automatically evaluate criteria and award badges. Badge state (locked vs. awarded) is persisted and rendered accordingly.
comment_summary: Waqar added all three badges with award functionality on the development environment. Unearned badges display in a locked state until criteria are met.
